hooks.comment: Playwright npm deps — only reinstall if package.json changed
hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install --prefer-offline 2>/dev/null) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"

hooks.comment: k6 — backend API/load testing, only install if missing
hooks.command: which k6 >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -sL https://github.com/grafana/k6/releases/download/v0.51.0/k6-v0.51.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar xz -C /tmp/ && sudo mv /tmp/k6-v0.51.0-linux-amd64/k6 /usr/local/bin/k6 2>/dev/null) || true

hooks.comment: Maestro — mobile testing CLI, only install if missing
SQLMap — SQL injection scanner, only install if missing
hooks.command: which sqlmap >/dev/null 2>&1 || pip install sqlmap --break-system-packages -q 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.comment: Frida tools — mobile security / SSL pinning bypass, only install if missing
hooks.command: which frida >/dev/null 2>&1 || pip install frida-tools --break-system-packages -q 2>/dev/null || true
